title: Ethiopian Noodle Stew
description: A flavorful and hearty stew made with noodles, inspired by Ethiopian cuisine. This paleo-friendly dish is perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the shredded cabbage and sliced carrots, cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the paleo beef broth and tagine spices, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the noodles are tender.
Add the Ethiopian noodles to the pot and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
